name: vortos/vortos-search
description: Vortos Search — enterprise-grade, event-fed unified global search. One tenant-scoped, RLS-isolated search_document projection fed from domain events via a discoverable SearchableProjection contract (add a type = add one class). Database-agnostic driver abstraction (portable LIKE default, opt-in Postgres full-text + trigram fuzzy), permission- and owner-aware ranked query, Redis-cached, with backfill/rebuild. The app owns what is searchable and where results deep-link; the framework owns the engine.

suggest.doctrine/dbal: Required for the default DBAL search index writer + reader.
suggest.ext-redis: Caches hot, normalised queries per tenant+principal (short TTL).
suggest.vortos/vortos-messaging: Kafka-decoupled indexing — domain events fan out to SearchableProjection implementations on a dedicated consumer group.
suggest.vortos/vortos-tenant: DB-enforced org isolation of the search index via row-level security on search_document.
suggest.vortos/vortos-authorization: Resolves the caller's permissions so results the caller cannot open are never returned.
suggest.vortos/vortos-scheduler: Drives the periodic index backfill/reconcile safety-net.
